title: One Love Beauty
short: A polished service website for a hair recovery specialist with consultation CTA, process, services, and client story.
needed: The business needed a premium website that could explain hair recovery services and make booking a consultation feel easy and trustworthy.
built: A clear homepage with a strong consultation CTA
Process section showing observe, treatment, and maintenance
Service cards for scalp analysis, hair restoration, replacement, and styling
Client story and footer contact flow
Booking and client portal buttons placed where visitors can act
matters: This helps visitors understand the service, see the process, and move toward booking instead of leaving unsure.

title: Dr. Akira
short: A professional mental health website with service cards, featured proof, FAQs, appointment CTA, and contact form.
needed: The client needed a calm, credible website that explains mental health services and gives visitors a clear appointment path.
built: Service cards for assessments, therapy, and speaking engagements
Areas of support and FAQ section
Contact form and appointment request section
matters: This gives visitors the information they need before reaching out and makes the next step easy to find.

title: Somatra Healing
short: A calming healing-service website with mission, services, about, benefits, contact, newsletter, and FAQs.
needed: The business needed an online presence that could explain a sensitive healing service in a calm, trusted way.
built: About section and service benefit section
FAQ section to answer visitor questions
matters: The site helps visitors understand the service and feel comfortable enough to learn more or contact the business.

title: Bare Canvas Media
short: A digital marketing website with hero CTA, service cards, mission sections, and consultation call-to-action.
needed: The brand needed a modern website that could present digital marketing services clearly and push visitors toward a consultation.
built: Large hero section with get-started CTA
Three value cards under the hero
Service cards for SEO, PPC, content, email, and web design
matters: This turns a broad digital marketing offer into clear service choices and a simple path to contact.

title: DaVinci Resolve Craftsman
short: A video editor website with services, portfolio gallery, pricing, work process, and booking contact.
needed: The creator needed a website that shows editing services, proof of work, packages, and a way to book.
built: Hero section for video editing services
Work process and booking contact area
matters: The site helps prospects see the skill, understand the offer, compare packages, and contact for service.

title: Bambo Oladipo
short: A personal brand website for a data analyst with service sections, skills, experience, testimonials, and contact.
needed: The client needed a personal brand website that presents expertise, services, proof, and contact information clearly.
built: Service cards for data analysis, visualization, and database management
matters: The site makes the expert easier to understand, easier to trust, and easier to contact.

title: VapourVend
short: A bold vending-machine website with product explanation, machine options, restock message, and enquiry CTA.
needed: The business needed a strong landing page that explains vape vending machines and encourages venues to enquire.
built: Bold hero section with enquiry CTA
matters: The site explains the product, shows why venues should care, and gives them a clear enquiry path.

title: 3 Nails 1 Cross
short: A faith-based ecommerce website with product categories, best sellers, testimonials, contact, and trust sections.
needed: The store needed a website that could show product categories and make the shopping path feel clear and trustworthy.
built: Product category blocks for keychains, hats, shirts, and wedding items
Testimonials, contact form, support, shipping, and guarantee sections
matters: The site helps visitors understand the brand, browse categories, and move toward shopping with more trust.

title: Zen Travels
short: A travel website with vacation types, promotional trips, resource CTA, gallery, FAQ, and contact section.
needed: The business needed a simple travel website that shows vacation options and helps visitors request help planning a trip.
built: Promotions, gallery, FAQs, and contact area
matters: The website turns travel planning into clear options and makes it easy for visitors to ask for help.

title: Concierge Wellness & Consulting
short: A wellness and consulting website with about, services, CTA, benefits, testimonials, FAQ, contact, and partner proof.
needed: The business needed a service website that explains wellness, therapy, and consulting options in one place.
built: Service cards for consulting, therapy, sports performance, and supervision
Testimonials, FAQs, contact, partners, and mailing list
matters: The site gives visitors the service options, trust points, and contact path needed before they reach out.

title: LaTonya Speaks
short: A personal brand website with speaking, coaching, consultation, testimonials, event proof, contact, and FAQ sections.
needed: The client needed a website to show her speaking, coaching, story, and consultation options clearly.
built: Image proof, contact form, steps to work together, FAQs, and subscribe section
matters: The website positions the client as a trusted expert and gives visitors clear ways to learn, book, or contact.

title: Shop & Ship Express Analytics
short: A Wix analytics view showing traffic, visitor behavior, top pages, contact clicks, sources, and AI visibility signals.
needed: The business needed to understand what was happening on the website instead of only judging by appearance.
built: Review of sessions, visitors, and clicks to contact
matters: This helps the business see what people are doing and decide what page, CTA, or traffic source needs attention next.
